description: Structured output from the builder agent. Returned after all screens are built and self-QA is complete.

status.description: 'complete' means all screens built and all success_criteria passed. 'blocked' means the agent stopped due to an ambiguity or missing information.

app_dir.description: Relative path to the app directory, e.g. apps/2026-W26-focus-timer

screens_built.description: Screens actually built — must match SPEC.md mvp_screens exactly when status is complete

components_reused.description: Components pulled from @boa/shared-ui that were used as-is

reason.description: Why this is generic enough to live in shared-ui

components_added_to_shared.description: New components added to packages/shared-ui during this build

components_app_specific.description: New components created inside the app directory (too specific for shared-ui)

evidence.description: What was observed that proves pass or identifies the gap

self_qa.description: One entry per item in SPEC.md success_criteria

question.description: The specific ambiguity or missing information

options.description: The two or three reasonable interpretations the human must choose between

blockers.description: Non-empty when status is 'blocked'. The human must resolve each blocker before the build can continue.

notes.description: Any context the builder wants to surface for the human reviewer — trade-offs made, assumptions documented, things to test manually
